sections.paragraph: f. (from the root שׁוּב), a turning away, defection; Pro 1:32, מְשׁוּבַת פְּתָיִם “the turning away of fools (from wisdom);” specially “turning away from Jehovah,” Jer 8:5 Hos 11:7, מְשׁוּבֶתִי “turning away from me;” pl. מְשׁוּבֹות Jer 2:19. Concr. used of Israel, who had turned away from God, Jer 3:6, , 11 , 12 .
